title: Look
description: A saved Looker Look (visualized query) that can be run, embedded, or rendered in a dashboard.

public.description: Indicates whether the Look is publicly accessible.

query_id.description: Identifier of the underlying query used to render the Look.

user_id.description: Identifier of the Looker user that owns the Look.

folder_id.description: Identifier of the folder where the Look is stored.
